stats.fact: Scout: 17B active params, 109B total, 16 experts, 10M context; Maverick: 17B active, ~400B total, 128 experts, 1M context
Scout pricing: $0.08/M input, $0.30/M output via DeepInfra; Maverick: $0.17/M input, $0.60/M output
Scout is 2.1x cheaper than Maverick for input tokens
Groq LPU hits 750 tokens/sec output decode on Llama 4 70B; Cerebras hits 600+ tokens/sec
Llama 4 Maverick MMMU: 73.4% vs GPT-4o 69.1% vs Gemini 2.0 Flash 71.7%
Maverick surpassed 1400 on LMarena benchmark, outperforming GPT-4o, Gemini 2.0 Flash, and DeepSeek V3
Llama 4 available from day one on AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, Together.ai, Groq, and Fireworks
Maverick outperforms Scout in 11 benchmarks (ChartQA, GPQA, LiveCodeBench, MATH, MathVista, MBPP, MGSM, MMLU, MMLU-Pro, MMMU, TydiQA)
MoE architecture: each token sent to shared expert + 1 of 128 routed experts (Maverick) or 1 of 16 (Scout)
